entries.surface: Numeric line/function coverage percentages (cargo llvm-cov unavailable in baseline environment)
entries.rationale: Closed by bd-im6j. CI now installs cargo-llvm-cov and emits numeric line/function coverage artifacts via scripts/testing/coverage_numeric.sh. Local environments may still lack llvm-cov, but release gating no longer depends on local-only availability.
compensating_controls: docs/testing/coverage-matrix-v0.1.md tracks uncovered paths and owners
PR fastlane and full quality gates must remain green
Deferred items are tracked as beads and linked below
